The Coronation of the Virgin, from a Book of Hours
by Attributed to Willem Vrelant or his workshop
Netherlands · medieval · 1460–1470 · Manuscript cutting in tempera and liquid gold on parchment
←After Raffaello Sanzio, called Raphael, and workshop Willem Vrelant or his workshop→
